news.title: ASX Runners: White Energy, Thrive Tribe, AnteoTech & Harvest
news.snippet: The Bulls N’ Bears ASX Runner of the Week is… White Energy Company, which surged on plans to acquire two metallurgical coal assets in the US and Queensland amid rising global energy security concerns.

news.title: ‘Chronic liar’: Libs’ brutal tax jab
news.snippet: Liberal Leader Angus Taylor has used his first address to party stalwarts since the federal budget to take a swipe at the Prime Minister’s controversial tax reforms.

news.title: Bank’s big decision should worry borrowers
news.snippet: Australians could soon be paying more for their mortgages as a major bank “offers an insight into what’s coming next” for interest rates.

news.title: Taxpayers, not Big Tobacco, are paying for our illegal smoke habit
news.snippet: Big Tobacco is still making a fortune in Australia, even as government revenue plunges – but organised crime will soon snuff this out.

news.title: KPMG CEO resigns as whistleblower scandal erupts
news.snippet: The consulting group has lost its top two executives after confirming another case where confidential customer information was allegedly shared for financial gain.

news.title: Aureka drills for fast-track gold restart at historic Vic gold pit
news.snippet: Aureka Limited has launched an infill diamond drilling campaign at its Comstock gold project in Victoria to upgrade the resource ahead of development studies.

news.title: Ex-CIA senior official tricked US government to give him $56m in gold bars
news.snippet: The truth about a former senior CIA official who conned the US government out millions of dollars worth of gold has been exposed.

news.title: Aussies slugged with huge tax truth bomb
news.snippet: As fury over recent tax changes boils over, stunning data reveals just how much extra Australians are really paying every year.

news.title: Lucky winner scores entire $60m Powerball
news.snippet: One lucky NSW woman has become a multi-millionaire, taking home a $60m million Powerball jackpot thanks to an insane detail.

news.title: We’re working harder than ever. So why don’t the metrics show it?
news.snippet: It feels like we’re all working hard for the salary we take home, so why do we keep hearing about a productivity slump?

news.title: Trump’s misfire: The electric car takeover is now unstoppable
news.snippet: The old car world order is facing demolition and the US president has helped accelerate the process.

news.title: New consumer protections would undermine Jetstar’s ‘existence’: CEO
news.snippet: Representatives from the airlines suggested the new legislation could worsen consumer outcomes on flights and drive up prices.
